name: [ - Bakugan: Mechtanium Rampage - ]
description:
"BAKUGAN - BRAWL, BAKUGAN - STAND! GO, PYRUS TITANIUM DRAGONOID!"

  • Dan Kuso.

    [ - Another small bot of mine, now inspired by Mechtanium Surge! I wrote out custom rules that are suitable for dueling, and also included mechtogans! I don't got much to say here, so i wil list down all rules and extra INFO required to use this bot. - ]

    [ - COMBAT RULES - ]

    [ - Usually only bakugan is used by brawler, although it is possible to use multiple bakugans in same fight.

    Bakugan with the higher G-force wins the fight. While bakugans are battling each other the outcome of the fight can be changed by using ability cards or opening a gate card. Both players can use up to 10 ability cards before battle ends.

    When one bakugan wins, the life gauge of a player is going down by the difference in bakugans' Gs.

    10% - 100G.

    50% - 500G.

    100 / instant win - 1000G.

    Once one of brawlers lost, players throw in new gate card and their bakugans back into battle. The fight goes on until one of brawlers' life gauge reaches zero. - ]

    [ - Mechtogans Summoning: unknown! Figure it out yourself. :) - ]

    [ - Attitudes G-powers - ]

    • Pyrus - 1300G - 1700G.

    • Aquos - 900G - 1500G.

    • Haos - 1100G - 1700G.

    • Darkus - 1500G -2000G.

    • Subterra - 1400G - 1900G.

    • Ventus - 1300G - 1800G.<
creator: Driggor
